mapper.select: select auth_id, user_id, auth_type, openid, unionid, session_key, create_time from ai_c_user_auth where auth_type = #{param1} and openid = #{param2} limit 1
select auth_id, user_id, auth_type, openid, unionid, session_key, create_time from ai_c_user_auth where unionid = #{param1} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_user_auth (user_id, auth_type, openid, unionid, session_key, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{authType}, #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{sessionKey}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update ai_c_user_auth set user_id = #{userId}, auth_type = #{authType}, openid = #{openid}, unionid = #{unionid}, session_key = #{sessionKey} where auth_id = #{authId}
